description: Wait for architect signal, implement frontend SPA spec, update status board, signal architect on completion

steps.content:
## Frontend SPA Implementation Spec
Written by frontend-dev.

Tech Stack:
  React 18 + TypeScript 5 + Vite bundler
  State management: Zustand
  Styling: Tailwind CSS

Pages:
  /login             — JWT auth form
  /dashboard         — task board (kanban view)
  /users             — user management (admin only)
  /tasks/:id         — task detail + status transitions

API Client:
  Generated from OpenAPI spec (matches backend endpoints).
  Type-safe request/response using zod schemas.
  WebSocket hook for real-time task board updates.

Components:
  TaskCard, KanbanColumn, UserAvatar, StatusBadge
  All components have Storybook stories.

Testing:
  Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E.
  Visual regression with Chromatic.
